Rules useless in parser due to conflicts

    8 B: "a" "a"


State 12 conflicts: 3 reduce/reduce


Grammar

    0 $accept: S $end

    1 S: "a" A "a"
    2  | "a" B "b"
    3  | "a" C "c"
    4  | "b" A "b"
    5  | "b" B "a"
    6  | "b" C "a"

    7 A: "a" "a"

    8 B: "a" "a"

    9 C: "a" "a"


Terminals, with rules where they appear

    $end (0) 0
    error (256)
    "a" (258) 1 2 3 5 6 7 8 9
    "b" (259) 2 4 5 6
    "c" (260) 3


Nonterminals, with rules where they appear

    $accept (6)
        on left: 0
    S (7)
        on left: 1 2 3 4 5 6
        on right: 0
    A (8)
        on left: 7
        on right: 1 4
    B (9)
        on left: 8
        on right: 2 5
    C (10)
        on left: 9
        on right: 3 6


State 0

    0 $accept: • S $end

    "a"  shift, and go to state 1
    "b"  shift, and go to state 2

    S  go to state 3


State 1

    1 S: "a" • A "a"
    2  | "a" • B "b"
    3  | "a" • C "c"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 4

    A  go to state 5
    B  go to state 6
    C  go to state 7


State 2

    4 S: "b" • A "b"
    5  | "b" • B "a"
    6  | "b" • C "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 4

    A  go to state 8
    B  go to state 9
    C  go to state 10


State 3

    0 $accept: S • $end

    $end  shift, and go to state 11


State 4

    7 A: "a" • "a"
    8 B: "a" • "a"
    9 C: "a" • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 12


State 5

    1 S: "a" A • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 13


State 6

    2 S: "a" B • "b"

    "b"  shift, and go to state 14


State 7

    3 S: "a" C • "c"

    "c"  shift, and go to state 15


State 8

    4 S: "b" A • "b"

    "b"  shift, and go to state 16


State 9

    5 S: "b" B • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 17


State 10

    6 S: "b" C • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 18


State 11

    0 $accept: S $end •

    $default  accept


State 12

    7 A: "a" "a" •
    8 B: "a" "a" •
    9 C: "a" "a" •

    "a"       reduce using rule 7 (A)
    "a"       [reduce using rule 8 (B)]
    "a"       [reduce using rule 9 (C)]
    "b"       reduce using rule 7 (A)
    "b"       [reduce using rule 8 (B)]
    "c"       reduce using rule 9 (C)
    $default  reduce using rule 7 (A)


State 13

    1 S: "a" A "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 1 (S)


State 14

    2 S: "a" B "b" •

    $default  reduce using rule 2 (S)


State 15

    3 S: "a" C "c" •

    $default  reduce using rule 3 (S)


State 16

    4 S: "b" A "b" •

    $default  reduce using rule 4 (S)


State 17

    5 S: "b" B "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 5 (S)


State 18

    6 S: "b" C "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 6 (S)
